---
name: Format-fit note
about: Propose a reframe that extends the format cleanly across topologies or surfaces
title: "[Format-fit] "
labels: format-fit
---

## What you were trying to write

Which case or surface surfaced the reframe need?

## Where the current format does not quite fit

Quote the specific section / phrase in FORMAT.md that does not extend cleanly.

## Proposed reframe

Suggested wording. Keep it minimal — ideally one-word or one-phrase changes that preserve prior readings while extending to the new context.

## Why this is a reframe, not a rewrite

Does the change alter the four-section structure or the invariants? If yes, this is a major version change and requires review by all maintainers. If no, it is a point-release reframe.

## Prior-case compatibility check

Does your proposed reframe still read correctly in:
- [ ] Case 1 (MCP invocation)
- [ ] Case 2 (wallet-bound aggregation)
- [ ] Any other published cases at time of proposal

If yes to all: proceed. If no: flag where it breaks and propose accommodation.
